name: Russian Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt the fish and let it stand for a few minutes.
2. Stew the vegetables in a little oil until tender.
3. Cut the fish into pieces and turn them in flour.
4. Fry the fish separately in oil until golden brown.
5. Add the fried fish pieces to the cooked vegetables.
6. Stir in about 5 tablespoons of tomato sauce (or paste) and a small amount of water.
7. Simmer together for 5 minutes.
8. Serve cold with potatoes.
